heading: Omitted
label: 175, 175a Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 175 and 175a, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 175, , , authorized establishment of a geophysical institute at the University of Alaska.act July 31, 1946, ch. 719, § 160 Stat. 750Section 175a, , , provided that buildings and equipment of geophysical institute shall become property of University of Alaska.act July 31, 1946, ch. 719, § 260 Stat. 751
amendments: CodificationSections 175 and 175a, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 175, , , authorized establishment of a geophysical institute at the University of Alaska.act July 31, 1946, ch. 719, § 160 Stat. 750Section 175a, , , provided that buildings and equipment of geophysical institute shall become property of University of Alaska.act July 31, 1946, ch. 719, § 260 Stat. 751
